name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Secure Dialer
title: '[ENHANCEMENT] '
labels: enhancement, feature
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Visual mockups or screenshots**
If you have an idea of how the UI should look, paste your sketches or descriptions here.

**How does this align with the "Zero-Internet" and "Privacy-First" Philosophy?**
Since Secure Dialer is strictly offline and does not use internet permissions, please explain how this feature can be achieved 100% on-device.
